# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-dev \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    vim \
    nano \
    htop \
    net-tools \
    iputils-ping \
    dnsutils \
    telnet \
    strace \
    ltrace \
    tcpdump \
    nmap \
    build-essential \
    gcc \
    g++ \
    make \
    cmake \
    pkg-config \
    libssl-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev \
    libreadline-dev \
    libsqlite3-dev \
    unzip \
    zip \
    tar \
    gzip \
    jq \
    tree \
    less \
    man-db \
    openssh-client \
    ca-certificates \
    software-properties-common \
    locales \
    sudo \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN locale-gen en_US.UTF-8
ENV LANG=en_US.UTF-8
ENV LANGUAGE=en_US:en
ENV LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8

RUN ln -sf /usr/bin/python3 /usr/bin/python && \
    ln -sf /usr/bin/pip3 /usr/bin/pip

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir \
    pandas \
    numpy \
    scipy \
    scikit-learn \
    matplotlib \
    seaborn \
    requests \
    sqlalchemy \
    psycopg2-binary \
    pymysql \
    redis \
    celery \
    flask \
    fastapi \
    uvicorn \
    pyyaml \
    python-dotenv \
    boto3 \
    jupyter \
    ipython \
    pytest \
    black \
    flake8 \
    pylint \
    mypy

WORKDIR /app

COPY requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

COPY . /app

EXPOSE 8000 8080 5000 8888

CMD ["python", "main.py"]
